texto: Our beliefs are the lens through which we see the world. They are the glasses we put on in the morning, which provide the patterns we see. As we become more self-aware, we can identify our patterns, and then, to the extent we desire, change our lenses.
explicacao: Citação de Patrick Sweeney sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Our beliefs are the lens through which we see the world. They are the glasses we put on in the mo…” articula reflexao, self-awareness, which em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e mudanca.
